# viettelidc_ovpc_vpc (Resource)

Provides a Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) resource on ViettelIDC.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "viettelidc_ovpc_vpc" "main" {
  name        = "my-vpc"
  cidr_block  = "10.0.0.0/16"
  description = "Main project VPC"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cidr_block` (String) IP address range in CIDR notation (e.g. 10.0.0.0/16). Cannot be changed after creation.
- `name` (String) Name of the VPC.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the VPC.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) VPC ID assigned by the platform.
- `status` (String) VPC status (success, pending, error...).
